title: SimpleQuery
description: To define properties related to generating simple query for filter query options. `Property` is needed to enable the simple query generation, and it should be the name of the property in the entity that is used for filtering. If `Property` is not provided, the control will not generate simple query for filter options, in such case, application developer should provide the filter query in the `ReturnValue` of `Items` or `PickerItems`. Example of query format: `Property` `Operator` `Value` e.g. Price eq 10. The `Operator` property is optional, and the default operator is 'eq' (equal to).

Operator.description: Comparison operator to be used for the simple query. If not provided, a default operator will be used.

Property.description: Name of the property in the entity to generate simple query for filter options. If not provided, simple query will not be generated for the filter options of the control.
